fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
EXCEL_FILE_TOO_LARGE: This workbook is too large to import.
EXCEL_CORRUPTED: This workbook could not be read safely.
EXCEL_YEAR_MISSING: Roomly could not detect the workbook year.
EXCEL_YEAR_CONFLICT: The workbook contains conflicting year information.
EXCEL_NO_SUPPORTED_SHEETS: No supported monthly sheets were found.
EXCEL_NO_IMPORTABLE_ROWS: No importable rows were found in this workbook.
EXCEL_PREVIEW_EXPIRED: This preview expired. Generate a new preview.
EXCEL_IMPORT_CONFLICT: This workbook has blocking conflicts and cannot be imported yet.
EXCEL_BATCH_NOT_FOUND: This import batch could not be found.
EXCEL_BATCH_ALREADY_UNDONE: This import batch was already undone.
WORK_ENTRY_TIME_OVERLAP: This activity overlaps an existing activity from {{start}} to {{end}}.
STATISTICS_INVALID_DATE_RANGE: Choose a valid statistics date range.
